data.metadata: {"description":"Abschud is the ultimate representation of being part of Abstract. One of the core team members, especially together with Sauci, is always active and supportive. He supported my growth on X, just as he has for countless others. Truly a legend."}
{"description":"It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)"}

translation.translatedDescription: It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)

data.metadata: {"description":"Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.metadata: {"description":"Je le vois partout, en plus d'être un Gigachad sur Abstract, il est très engagé au sein de la communauté crypto dans son ensemble. Il est très impliqué également au sein du Smol Talk, qui est un Space journalier Français, qui traite de divers sujets d'actualités crypto."}

translation.translatedDescription: I see him everywhere, in addition to being a Gigachad on Abstract, he is very engaged within the crypto community as a whole. He is also very involved in Smol Talk, which is a daily French Space that deals with various crypto news topics.

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!

data.metadata: {"description":"Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. \n\nShe is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. 

She is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!

He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend."}

He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend.

data.comment: The Gigachad of Abstract in Korea

translation.translatedContent: The Gigachad of Abstract in Korea
translation.translatedDescription:
KangBokSoon is the legend in the Korean Gigachad community. He is always on top, taking care of the Abstract Korea community in the Telegram chat and with content on X.

I also had a chance to meet him in Korea during KBW. SUPER NICE GUY.

KangBokSoon has super good energy that people want to be around!

data.comment: Nat Head of the Abstract Thailand Chapter & Guardian of the Community
data.metadata:
{"description":"Nat is both a devoted father and the Giga Chad of Abstract in Thailand. On Discord, he takes on the role of community moderator always present, always dependable.

He has global impact for sure, but his main mission is focused on educating and growing the Abstract ecosystem within Thailand. He’s a true builder, introducing new people to Abstract every day and making the community feel like home.

Sometimes he jokingly calls me “Oppa” yes, the Korean word just for fun in English. It always catches me off guard and makes everyone laugh.

He frequently hosts Spaces where he and other community members explore everything happening in Abstract. I often join just to listen and translate in Korean while learning from him.

I met him in person at KBW 2025, and we had a really nice conversation. He was there with Billy both of them are great friends and even better people.

We share the same sentiment at the end of the day

We love Abstract."}

translation.translatedContent: Nat Head of the Abstract Thailand Chapter & Guardian of the Community
translation.translatedDescription:
Nat is both a devoted father and the Giga Chad of Abstract in Thailand. On Discord, he takes on the role of community moderator always present, always dependable.

He has global impact for sure, but his main mission is focused on educating and growing the Abstract ecosystem within Thailand. He’s a true builder, introducing new people to Abstract every day and making the community feel like home.

Sometimes he jokingly calls me “Oppa” yes, the Korean word just for fun in English. It always catches me off guard and makes everyone laugh.

He frequently hosts Spaces where he and other community members explore everything happening in Abstract. I often join just to listen and translate in Korean while learning from him.

I met him in person at KBW 2025, and we had a really nice conversation. He was there with Billy both of them are great friends and even better people.

We share the same sentiment at the end of the day

We love Abstract.

data.comment: Brian Hong, Driving Abstract’s Growth in Korea
data.metadata:
{"description":"In Korea’s rapidly evolving Web3 scene, Brian Hong has become a name that carries weight. As the APAC Growth Lead at Abstract, he has been one of the key figures driving the platform’s rise to prominence in the Korean market. His work has not only elevated Abstract’s presence but also shaped how the community perceives and engages with it.

Brian’s influence comes from his ability to communicate more than just features or announcements. He frames Abstract as an experience worth exploring, a culture worth joining, and a vision that people can be excited about. This approach transformed Abstract from a project people simply knew about into one they genuinely care to be part of.

One of Brian’s defining contributions has been his ability to unite. In a landscape where Korean KOLs often operate independently, he created alignment, bringing fragmented voices together under a shared purpose. This cohesion has amplified Abstract’s impact and strengthened its reputation within the Korean Web3 space.

What makes Brian particularly effective is his mix of strategic thinking and authentic connection. He doesn’t rely on hype or surface-level engagement. Instead, he builds lasting interest by sparking genuine curiosity and fostering meaningful participation. People follow Brian not out of obligation but because they want to be part of what he’s building.

In Korea, Abstract is now a name that resonates. And behind that resonance, there is Brian Hong — a connector, a storyteller, and a leader whose influence is shaping not only a community but a movement."}

translation.translatedContent: Brian Hong, Driving Abstract’s Growth in Korea
translation.translatedDescription:
In Korea’s rapidly evolving Web3 scene, Brian Hong has become a name that carries weight. As the APAC Growth Lead at Abstract, he has been one of the key figures driving the platform’s rise to prominence in the Korean market. His work has not only elevated Abstract’s presence but also shaped how the community perceives and engages with it.

Brian’s influence comes from his ability to communicate more than just features or announcements. He frames Abstract as an experience worth exploring, a culture worth joining, and a vision that people can be excited about. This approach transformed Abstract from a project people simply knew about into one they genuinely care to be part of.

One of Brian’s defining contributions has been his ability to unite. In a landscape where Korean KOLs often operate independently, he created alignment, bringing fragmented voices together under a shared purpose. This cohesion has amplified Abstract’s impact and strengthened its reputation within the Korean Web3 space.

What makes Brian particularly effective is his mix of strategic thinking and authentic connection. He doesn’t rely on hype or surface-level engagement. Instead, he builds lasting interest by sparking genuine curiosity and fostering meaningful participation. People follow Brian not out of obligation but because they want to be part of what he’s building.

In Korea, Abstract is now a name that resonates. And behind that resonance, there is Brian Hong — a connector, a storyteller, and a leader whose influence is shaping not only a community but a movement.

I’d like to vouch for Nat, the OG of Pudgy Penguins Thailand and a true community builder at heart. He’s been a welcoming force in the Thai Web3 scene — always the first to reach out, help newcomers, and make sure people feel at home. If you’re ever in Thailand, hitting him up is a must.

Nat is all about education and empowerment. He’s constantly helping others level up — whether it’s through sharing knowledge, supporting builders, or encouraging growth in the space. A real pillar in the local community.

No question — Nat is the GOAT of Pudgy and Abstract Thailand.

data.metadata: {"description":"Part Thai is a remarkably humble individual despite his extraordinary profile. He contributes significantly to the Pudgy community behind the scenes, maintaining a low profile without revealing his identity to the public. This greatly impresses me. He is an invaluable asset to Pudgy and will always remain at the forefront of my mind. As an exceptional developer, he is always open to hearing my feedback from using Abstract. He acts swiftly, addressing bugs with impressive speed."}

translation.translatedDescription: Part Thai is a remarkably humble individual despite his extraordinary profile. He contributes significantly to the Pudgy community behind the scenes, maintaining a low profile without revealing his identity to the public. This greatly impresses me. He is an invaluable asset to Pudgy and will always remain at the forefront of my mind. As an exceptional developer, he is always open to hearing my feedback from using Abstract. He acts swiftly, addressing bugs with impressive speed.

I love him.
Pudgy Thailand community loves him.
Thank you for being a good person on Web 3"}

I know Part Thai from the Pudgy Thailand community. He is super generous and kind. I'm not sure if we can ask for more from him. Part Thai ALWAYS supports the community and artists, and it doesn't matter what product we offer him. Part Thai says YES in a second.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.comment: Abstract의 교육자이자 한 가정 아버지, Nat
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Nat은 Abstract가 탄생하기 훨씬 전부터 Pudgy Penguins의 커뮤니티의 일원이었습니다.

Nat은 2021 부인에게 Pudgy Penguins NFT를 선물했고, 2022년 펏지 펭귄 태국 커뮤니티를 만들었으며, 2023년 펏지펭귄 MVP를 수상했어요. 이것만 보더라도 펏지펭귄 OG 중의 OG입니다.(증거는 그의 지갑에 있는 SBT를 확인하면 고개를 끄덕일 겁니다.)

이제 Abstract 이야기를 해보죠. 2024년 Abstract의 탄생과 동시에 태국 커뮤니티를 창설하고 기가채드들을 선별하는 역할을 했습니다(저도 그에게 발탁되어 Giga Chad가 된 것 같아요).

꾸준히 자신의 국가인 태국에서 세미나를 열어 사람들에게 지식을 나눠 주고, 실제로 밋업을 주최하며 적극적으로 사람들과 교류해서 생태계에 기여합니다. 그리고 Abstract 과련 AMA, Space, Live Stream 등 도 적극적으로 주최 하는데... 제가 캐치하지 못한 활동 범위를 가지고 있어요.

요즘은 Abstract에서 APAC 지역에 집중 마케팅을 펼치고 있는데 적극적인 지원을 하고 있습니다. Abstract Korea Guild 속칭 AKG를 만들어 한국 사람들을 열심히 결집시키고 앱스트랙트의 Dapp 게임들을 많이 소개합니다.

Nat은 에너자이저인가 봐요... 절대 안 지칩니다. 이러한 공로를 인정받아 2026년 지금 Abstract의 정식 팀원으로 합류했어요.

가끔씩 Nat의 피드에 가족 사진을 올리는데 자식과 함께 정말 행복해 보여요. 저도 이런 가정을 이루고 싶습니다. 실제로 KBW 2025 당시 Abstract 관련 행사에서 많이 만났고, 아주 나이스한 친구입니다."
}

translation.translatedContent: Nat, an educator at Abstract and a father
translation.translatedDescription:
Nat has been a part of the Pudgy Penguins community since long before Abstract was even born.

Nat gifted his wife a Pudgy Penguins NFT in 2021, created the Pudgy Penguins Thailand community in 2022, and won the Pudgy Penguins MVP in 2023. Just from this, you can tell he's an OG among OGs. (If you check the SBT in his wallet, you'll nod in agreement.)

Now, let's talk about Abstract. With the birth of Abstract in 2024, he founded the Thai community and played a role in selecting the Giga Chads (I think I was selected by him to become a Giga Chad).

He consistently holds seminars in his country, Thailand, to share knowledge with people, actively hosts meetups, and contributes to the ecosystem by actively interacting with people. He also actively hosts Abstract-related AMAs, Spaces, Live Streams, etc... He has a range of activities that I haven't even caught.

These days, Abstract is focusing on marketing in the APAC region, and he is actively supporting it. He created Abstract Korea Guild, also known as AKG, to diligently unite Koreans and introduce many of Abstract's Dapp games.

Nat must be an Energizer bunny... he never gets tired. In recognition of these contributions, he officially joined the Abstract team in 2026.

Occasionally, Nat posts family photos on his feed, and he looks really happy with his children. I want to build a family like that too. I actually met him a lot at Abstract-related events during KBW 2025, and he's a very nice guy.

data.author: 0xA96E173551f07aF35F2bc4cBCD8D3a21E8DA39BC
data.subject: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x68e33A587f1d697c5e0f8b8794cFA304B41a61e2
data.metadata: {"description":"I met Sanjay briefly through Elisa in Dubai. He was very warm and welcoming. I had no idea who he was or what his experience was in the space, then I found out he was this very well-known and recognized gaming + multi-chain creator.\n\nI have had the pleasure of watching him from the sidelines and through friends in common, and I have nothing but great things to say about his professionalism, his wit and quality content."}

translation.translatedDescription:
I met Sanjay briefly through Elisa in Dubai. He was very warm and welcoming. I had no idea who he was or what his experience was in the space, then I found out he was this very well-known and recognized gaming + multi-chain creator.

I have had the pleasure of watching him from the sidelines and through friends in common, and I have nothing but great things to say about his professionalism, his wit and quality content.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x25954Fb49bFc6A2A09770be5CCA756c8676F31ba

translation.translatedDescription:
I had the pleasure of meeting Becca in Dubai this year for Token 2049. She was one of the kindest and nicest people to come up to me and involve me in the activities.

I was able to connect with her on a friendly level and realize what a hard-working woman she is. She is remarkable and has made so much impact in Web3, not only through her job at AP, but also in the wider Pudgy Penguin Ecosystem.

It's been a joy to watch her live her dreams, achieve her goals, and now being part of the team.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0xee15Bf34284464a7d41c6162DB0d364b3B6768CF
data.metadata:
{"description":"Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x2CCFF304eF578B238eE82E1D1d53c34e80B48ad6

I wish there were more people like AL!

data.metadata:
{"description":"Gucci_GCC est super actif sur Abstract et ça se voit.
Il participe à tous les événements et jeux de la chaîne, et partage souvent ses résultats et analyses.
Il fait aussi attention à la sécurité et aime montrer des outils utiles pour protéger ses actifs.
Sa présence sur la chaîne commence vraiment à peser, et il influence de plus en plus la communauté.
Suivre Gucci_GCC, c’est toujours avoir une bonne idée de ce qui se passe sur Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: Gucci_GCC is super active on Abstract, and it shows. He participates in all the channel's events and games, and often shares his results and analyses. He also pays attention to security and likes to show useful tools for protecting your assets. His presence on the channel is really starting to carry weight, and he is increasingly influencing the community. Following Gucci_GCC always gives you a good idea of what's happening on Abstract.

data.metadata: {"description":"I first discovered BadlyNasty on X, and was immediately impressed by his positive energy and uplifting vibe. He is always smiling and cheerful, which makes his streams such a joy to watch. Even though I don't understand French, I genuinely enjoy his French-language streams—the atmosphere is fantastic and welcoming. His creativity and engagement in the AbstractChain community stand out and bring inspiration to many viewers. BadlyNasty is truly a bright spot for everyone around."}

translation.translatedDescription: I first discovered BadlyNasty on X, and was immediately impressed by his positive energy and uplifting vibe. He is always smiling and cheerful, which makes his streams such a joy to watch. Even though I don't understand French, I genuinely enjoy his French-language streams—the atmosphere is fantastic and welcoming. His creativity and engagement in the AbstractChain community stand out and bring inspiration to many viewers. BadlyNasty is truly a bright spot for everyone around.
